title: Smart Crafting Table
description: A simple smarter crafting table to craft items
body:
A simple yet powerful new block that redefines how you craft!

Tired of endlessly scrolling through recipes or forgetting what you can make? If your inventory is cluttered with items and you're not sure what to do with them, the Smart Crafting Table is your new best friend.

This intelligent workstation scans your entire inventory and instantly displays all craftable recipes based on what you’re currently holding. Whether you're building casually or managing a massive modpack with thousands of items, this tool is a game-changer for efficiency and convenience.

See only the recipes you can actually craft

No more guessing or memorizing complex patterns

Perfect for both beginners and seasoned modded veterans

Ideal for automation setups and large-scale projects

Also has a handy search bar to find the item you want

Craft smarter, not harder — with the Smart Crafting Table.
